skills.name: Jenkins Initial Settings
skills.desc: Jenkins Initial Settings cover the initial configuration and setup of Jenkins after installation.

skills.name: Use Docker Installation
skills.desc: Using Docker Installation explains the process of installing and running Jenkins within a Docker container.

skills.name: Create Project
skills.desc: Creating a Project in Jenkins involves setting up and configuring a project for continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD).

skills.name: Build History
skills.desc: Build History refers to tracking and analyzing the historical build and deployment records within Jenkins.

skills.name: Managing Plugins
skills.desc: Managing Plugins covers the installation, configuration, and management of Jenkins plugins to extend functionality.

skills.name: Pipeline
skills.desc: Pipelines in Jenkins are used to define and automate a series of steps to build, test, and deploy software applications. They provide a structured and repeatable way to manage software delivery processes, enabling continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) practices.

skills.name: Running Pipelines
skills.desc: Running Pipelines covers the execution and management of pipelines, ensuring they run smoothly and produce desired outcomes.

skills.name: Creating a Pipeline
skills.desc: Creating a Pipeline in Blue Ocean involves defining and configuring pipelines using the intuitive Blue Ocean interface.

skills.name: Activity View
skills.desc: Activity View in Blue Ocean offers a dynamic overview of pipeline activities and progress.
